Lefts

C none
AND 60-0n length 1
OR 15-0 26-1 37-2 40-3 51-4 62-5 73-6 04-7 complete length 8

Rights

C none
AND none
OR 04-7 73-6 62-5 51-4 40-3 37-2 26-1 15-0 complete length 8
XOR none
AND-NOT 13-7n length 1
OR-NOT none

Left longest: 8
Right longest: 8

Left winner: I none, C none, AND lost, OR win, XOR none, AND-NOT lost, OR-NOT lost
Right winner: I lost, C none, AND none, OR win, XOR none, AND-NOT lost, OR-NOT none

Longest Left: OR 15-0 26-1 37-2 40-3 51-4 62-5 73-6 04-7 complete
Longest Right: OR 04-7 73-6 62-5 51-4 40-3 37-2 26-1 15-0 complete

8 + 8 = 16 > 8
Right will be truncated to length 8 - 8 = 0

Truncated left: OR 15-0 26-1 37-2 40-3 51-4 62-5 73-6 04-7 complete
Truncated right: none truncated

Tentative from right

0 OR 15

0 OR 15
1 OR 26
2 OR 37
3 OR 40

5 OR 62

7 OR 04

Preferred from right
7 OR 04
6 OR 73
5 OR 62
4 OR 51
3 OR 40
2 OR 37
1 OR 26
0 OR 15

Matched
0 OR 15
1 OR 26
2 OR 37
3 OR 40
4 OR 51
5 OR 62
6 OR 73
7 OR 04

Applying to 01100100
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 OR 15 = OR(I 1,I 5) = OR(1,1) = 1
1 OR 26 = OR(I 2,I 6) = OR(1,0) = 1
2 OR 37 = OR(I 3,I 7) = OR(0,0) = 0
3 OR 40 = OR(I 4,I 0) = OR(0,0) = 0
4 OR 51 = OR(I 5,I 1) = OR(1,1) = 1
5 OR 62 = OR(I 6,I 2) = OR(0,1) = 1
6 OR 73 = OR(I 7,I 3) = OR(0,0) = 0
7 OR 04 = OR(I 0,I 4) = OR(0,0) = 0

\boxed{11001100}
